LanguageData.FB_HeartHemogelFeedingToggleDesc: Allow pawns accepted by the flesh colony to feed directly from this heart's hemogel reserve.
LanguageData.FB_ManualFeedingPawnUnavailable: This pawn cannot take the order.
LanguageData.FB_ManualFeedingNoFoodNeed: This pawn does not need food.
LanguageData.FB_ManualFeedingHeartUnavailable: This heart cannot feed the pawn.
LanguageData.FB_ManualFeedingBlocked: Hemogel feeding is disabled for this heart.
LanguageData.FB_ManualFeedingHandsFull: The pawn cannot carry another portion.
